failures.reason: Nested FAtoGDB was signaled on a worker node although direct pinned FAtoGDB diagnostics 1781958/1781959/1781960 completed; P07 canary nested execution succeeded on highmem octopus02
failures.retry_action: retry primary compute on canary-proven highmem partition with unchanged biological parameters

failures.reason: SweepGA nested FAtoGDB child was signaled on canary-proven octopus02; direct real-input FAtoGDB diagnostics succeeded
failures.retry_action: digest-verify and prebuild FAtoGDB/GIXmake sidecars, then retain SweepGA --num-mappings 1:1 as mapping owner

failures.reason: Baseline captured handoff FAtoGDB segfaulted during explicit sidecar prebuild; its digest differs from the companion actually resolved by successful P07 canary
failures.retry_action: pin complete canary-proven SweepGA sibling companion suite by path and SHA256, verify every digest, resubmit unchanged primary

failures.reason: Canary-proven FAtoGDB companion segfaulted on octopus02 /scratch resolving through /mnt/sdb1; same binary/input diagnostics succeeded on worker /scratch
failures.retry_action: retain pinned companion and unchanged SweepGA parameters; route P08 mapping to worker scratch

failures.reason: Canary-proven FAtoGDB companion segfaulted only beneath the shared multi-stage wrapper on worker scratch; direct pinned helper jobs and the full minimal SweepGA diagnostic passed helper preparation on the same worker class
failures.retry_action: retain exact primary and canary-pinned companions, but use a minimal canary-style mapping entrypoint independent of the unstable shared wrapper

failures.reason: FastGA transient pair files inherited /tmp while inputs and outputs used measured node-local scratch; /tmp filled during the unchanged P08 primary alignment
failures.retry_action: export TMPDIR as the same measured per-job scratch and resubmit the unchanged primary with identical SweepGA parameters

failures.reason: Single IMPG query process emitted only 2,446 of 608,347 frozen P04 native query regions after 00:04:42 of query time while underusing its 32-CPU allocation, projecting more than 19 hours for query extraction before lacing
failures.retry_action: retain the exact primary mapping/index/partition/query rows and retry with a disjoint, exhaustive eight-way in-allocation query split using private temp and output directories

failures.reason: FastGA child terminated after 37m28s with no child exit code after successful FAtoGDB/GIX preparation; measured scratch had 754,285,813,760 bytes free, Slurm allocated 160 GiB but reported no terminal MaxRSS
failures.retry_action: increase unchanged-primary mapping allocation to 256 GiB memory, 200 GiB required node-local scratch and four-day wall time

failures.reason: FastGA reported multiple local scratch pair-file write failures on octopus11 after 41m40s; post-failure filesystem check showed 721 GiB and 468,845,064 inodes free
failures.retry_action: retain unchanged primary; increase to 320 GiB memory and 300 GiB required scratch, extend to five days, and exclude failed node octopus11

failures.reason: P10 mapping was stopped after four minutes when scheduled on octopus11, after that node caused verified P06 local-scratch write failures and the P03 child loss
failures.retry_action: retain unchanged primary and 320 GiB/320 GiB/5d allocation; exclude octopus11 for P09 and P10 mappings

failures.reason: P05 IMPG was stopped after 1m34s when allocated to octopus11, the node with verified local-scratch write failures; IMPG would write hundreds of thousands of regional files
failures.retry_action: retain unchanged P05 primary and exclude octopus11 from every scratch-writing biological stage

failures.reason: Independent full SweepGA 1:1 recomputation reached the originally requested 03:00:00 scheduler wall time while FastGA was still executing; inputs staged and indexes completed without a biological or input error
failures.retry_action: resubmit the identical independent primary-input computation as job 1782351 with 06:00:00 wall time; retain job 1781961 and its reason

failures.reason: After exact completion of all 608,347 disjoint frozen IMPG queries, 13 of 16 uncompressed hierarchical lace chunks were only 17-30% merged while chunk outputs had reached about 363 GiB and only about 503 GiB remained on the node, projecting a real node-local exhaustion before lossless site projection
failures.retry_action: retain unchanged P04 primary and durable mapping; retry exact query/lace with lossless BGZF-compressed intermediate lace chunks and a 600 GiB measured scratch requirement

failures.reason: FastGA child again terminated with no child exit code at 37m03s after successful FAtoGDB/GIX preparation, this time on healthy octopus07 with 256 GiB memory, 200 GiB required scratch and 445,790,732,288 scratch bytes available; this independently reproduces job 1782068 on octopus11
failures.reclassification_basis: User-directed correction: pair/child failures predated enforced private-/scratch cwd plus TMPDIR/TMP/TEMP live-path guard; retry as infrastructure, not a terminal primary exclusion.
failures.retry_action: retain the original reason and unchanged primary inputs; retry under commit 870715e with live /proc cwd/temp/managed-file containment and the measured pair allocation

failures.reason: FastGA reproduced its pair-file IO write failure on healthy octopus07 after successful FAtoGDB/GIX preparation, with 320 GiB memory, 300 GiB required scratch and 446,230,953,984 scratch bytes available; independent-node retry confirms the P06 execution failure first observed in job 1782154 on octopus11
failures.reclassification_basis: User-directed correction: pair/child failures predated enforced private-/scratch cwd plus TMPDIR/TMP/TEMP live-path guard; retry as infrastructure, not a terminal primary exclusion.
failures.retry_action: retain the original reason and unchanged primary inputs; retry under commit 870715e with live /proc cwd/temp/managed-file containment and the measured pair allocation

failures.reason: P09 FastGA had grown its node-local working set to about 129 GiB while unrelated workload growth on octopus07 occupied about 430 GiB, leaving only 105,963,180,032 bytes free during active alignment and eliminating substantial headroom before a write failure
failures.retry_action: retain unchanged primary; raise mapping requirement to 600 GiB measured free scratch and exclude octopus07 plus failed octopus11 for both remaining large shark mappings

failures.reason: Exact 16-way frozen IMPG query extraction failed deterministically: graph lookup could not find sequences JAYKKY010000001.1 and JAYKKY010000134.1 in either staged primary FASTA, and native Rust VCF extraction rejected mixed variant types at a site; successful shards cannot substitute for the failed exact census
failures.retry_action: stop the affected P05 primary; retain mapping and every IMPG error, do not omit failed regions, change output semantics, or relax the frozen query contract

failures.reason: FastGA reproduced a pair-file IO write failure on healthy octopus09 after successful FAtoGDB/GIX preparation, with 320 GiB memory, 600 GiB required scratch and 774,414,675,968 scratch bytes available at start; this independently follows the headroom-protected P09 attempt 1782270 on octopus07
failures.reclassification_basis: User-directed correction: pair/child failures predated enforced private-/scratch cwd plus TMPDIR/TMP/TEMP live-path guard; retry as infrastructure, not a terminal primary exclusion.
failures.retry_action: retain the original reason and unchanged primary inputs; retry under commit 870715e with live /proc cwd/temp/managed-file containment and the measured pair allocation

failures.reason: FastGA failed with pair-file IO writes on healthy octopus09 after successful FAtoGDB/GIX preparation, with 320 GiB memory, 600 GiB required scratch and 766,902,435,840 scratch bytes available at start; the protected allocation rules out the earlier node-headroom condition and reproduces the same hard execution mode seen independently for the other large shark primary
failures.reclassification_basis: User-directed correction: pair/child failures predated enforced private-/scratch cwd plus TMPDIR/TMP/TEMP live-path guard; retry as infrastructure, not a terminal primary exclusion.
failures.retry_action: retain the original reason and unchanged primary inputs; retry under commit 870715e with live /proc cwd/temp/managed-file containment and the measured pair allocation

failures.reason: Independent full P08 SweepGA 1:1 recomputation reached the doubled 06:00:00 scheduler wall time while FastGA remained CPU-active on the identical digest-verified primary inputs; no biological or input error was emitted and the separately authorized P08 primary job is unaffected
failures.retry_action: retain both independent timeout attempts as diagnostic evidence; do not activate an alternate or infer failure of primary P08 from the auxiliary recomputation limit

failures.reason: Exact 16-way P02 IMPG query extraction failed deterministically after most of the 1,375,084-region census: graph lookup panicked because sequences JBDMAU010000296.1, JBDMAU010000433.1, and JBDMAU010000398.1 were absent from both staged frozen primary FASTAs; successful shards cannot substitute for the failed exact census
failures.retry_action: stop the affected P02 primary downstream path; retain its completed exact mapping and every IMPG error, do not omit failed regions, substitute successful shards, or relax the frozen query contract

failures.reason: Exact 16-way P01 IMPG query extraction failed deterministically near the end of its 1,150,008-region census: graph lookup panicked because sequence CM070280.1 was absent from both staged frozen primary FASTAs; successful shards cannot substitute for the failed exact census
failures.retry_action: stop the affected P01 primary downstream path; retain its completed exact mapping and every IMPG error, do not omit the failed region, substitute successful shards, or relax the frozen query contract

failures.reason: All 608,347 exact P04 regional queries and all 16 lossless lace shards completed, but the pinned IMPG executable emitted bzip2 BZ streams for its documented --compress bgzip option; the fail-closed post-lace reader rejected those streams as non-gzip before any output promotion
failures.retry_action: retain the complete failure reason, decode the observed pinned bzip2 stream losslessly into bcftools without writing an uncompressed multi-sample VCF, and rerun the unchanged P04 primary from its durable exact mapping checkpoint

failures.reason: All 608,347 exact P04 regional queries completed and passed the exhaustive census, after which all 32 pinned IMPG lace processes remained alive but consumed zero CPU for more than ten minutes at 'Scanning files with 1 threads' and emitted no chunk; the allocation was canceled before promotion after direct process, log, and output-growth checks confirmed the one-thread execution deadlock
failures.retry_action: retain the complete attempt and cancellation reason, require the empirically working two-thread IMPG lace minimum, expand P04 IMPG to all 48 node CPUs for 24 independent lace workers, and rerun the unchanged primary from its durable exact mapping checkpoint

failures.reason: One of 16 exact P04 IMPG query processes segfaulted after concurrent processes raced to create the same private staged h2.fa.fai; htslib reported malformed index line 307 while the other disjoint shards continued, and the workflow correctly refused the partial 608,347-region census
failures.retry_action: retain the segfault and partial-census refusal, prebuild and validate both private staged FASTA indexes once with pinned samtools before concurrent read-only IMPG queries, then rerun the unchanged P04 primary from its durable exact mapping checkpoint

failures.reason: All 608,347 exact P04 regional queries completed and all 24 two-thread lossless lace processes returned success. The first site-projection decoder then failed before bcftools because the Bash heredoc pipeline parsed its Python import line as a shell command (import: command not found; exit 127). The biological inputs, exact query census, lace outputs, memory, scratch, and wall time were not the cause.
failures.remediation: Replace the ambiguous heredoc pipeline with an executable-tested python3 -c bzip2 decoder piped to pinned bcftools; rerun the unchanged P04 primary with the same measured 48 CPU, 160 GiB, 600 GiB scratch, three-day allocation.

failures.reason: Live audit found FastGA cwd and every observed .bps/.gix/_algn/_uniq path under the private /scratch mount, but the launch predated the complete contract: TMP and TEMP were unset and the batch did not cd into the private workdir before invoking SweepGA. No mapping sentinel or durable alignment output existed at cancellation.
